title: Manager snoops on employee’s personal bank account after employee calls in sick
summary: An individual who worked at a credit union alleged that her manager had accessed her personal financial information without consent. Her manager had suspected that the individual had wrongfully called in sick to attend to out-of-province family matters and, as the individual was also a customer of the credit union, accessed the transactio...
